entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop being bred for resistance to harmful insects.

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop variety to withstand attack by harmful insects.

entities.description: The process of developing crop varieties with desired traits like pest resistance.

entities.name: HARMFUL INSECTS
entities.description: Pests that attack sorghum during all stages of growth.

entities.description: The management and reduction of harmful insect populations.

entities.name: INSECTICIDE USE
entities.description: The application of chemical insecticides for pest control, noted for economic and environmental constraints.

relationships.description: Breeding is used to develop varieties with pest resistance

Harmful insects attack sorghum during all stages of growth
